IApiServerConfig Methods

One Identity Manager API Server

The IApiServerConfig type exposes the following members.

Methods
  NameDescription
AddServiceConnectionHook
Registers an action to be called on every creation of a new service connection.
Connect
GetAppDataPath
GetAppServerServiceConnectionAsync
GetConfigDataAsync
GetConnectionString
GetServiceConnectionAsync(CancellationToken)

Restart
Triggers a restart of the API Server in a way that reinitializes the API.
